evidence: HybridQueryExecutor.java.tmp.16216.1771545912963 (68KB) lives in src/main/java/…/query/ — a full implementation of the old hybrid executor, not compiled but present as a migration artifact with @Deprecated enum values (SAMPLE_SCAN, SPAN_COUNT), a deprecated constructor, and a deprecated setCollocationPath method.

QueryExecutor.java interface Javadoc still reads 'Allows different implementations (legacy, hybrid, BlackLab) to be used interchangeably' — the 'legacy' and 'hybrid' implementations no longer exist in active source.

QueryExecutor.executeBcqlQuery() has a default that says '// Default: treat BCQL as CQL (for backward compatibility)' — but the sole active implementation (BlackLabQueryExecutor) overrides it, making the shim vestigial.
QueryExecutor.getExecutorType() Javadoc lists return examples as '"legacy", "hybrid"' — stale references to removed executor types.
SimpleTagger in tagging/ package has no callers in production source (only SimpleTaggerTest); it was used as a fallback before UDPipe/Stanza became the tagging pipeline.
LongIntHashMap in utils/ package has no production callers (only LongIntHashMapTest); appears to be a data structure from the old hybrid indexer era.
HybridAlgorithmTest.java is a test class named after the removed hybrid executor, but its test body now tests GrammarConfigLoader — a misleading name left over from migration.
src/test/resources/baseline/metadata.txt contains 'Executor: legacy' — stale label from before the BlackLab migration.
QueryResults.ConcordanceResult has a 'Simplified constructor without docId for backward compatibility' note, but no active code calls it (all callers use the full constructor).

strengths: The active code path (Main.java → BlackLabQueryExecutor → BlackLabConllUIndexer) is exclusively on the new BlackLab API with no dual-mode coexistence in hot paths.
The QueryExecutor interface provides a clean abstraction boundary; the migration settled on a single concrete implementation without any conditional 'if legacy else new' branching in production.
GrammarConfigLoader actively rejects old config formats (throws if 'copulas' key is present), enforcing migration rather than silently supporting old input.
incomplete_migration.issue_character: Issues are scattered migration residue — dead code classes, a stale temp file, stale interface comments and shim defaults — rather than a structural dual-API coexistence problem; the core migration is done but the cleanup pass was incomplete.
incomplete_migration.score_rationale: The migration to BlackLab is structurally complete: no deprecated-but-called code exists in any production execution path, and the system has a single coherent API surface in use. What pulls the score below 80 is a cluster of unremoved artifacts: a 68KB .tmp file of the old HybridQueryExecutor sitting in the source tree, two dead utility/helper classes (SimpleTagger, LongIntHashMap) with no production callers, stale interface comments that still reference removed executor types, a vestigial backward-compat default method, a misleadingly named test class, and a stale test baseline label. These are classic 'migration done, cleanup skipped' patterns — not severe enough for the 60s anchor of 'significant drag' on day-to-day development, but numerous enough to prevent a score above 75.

issues.summary: Old HybridQueryExecutor left as a .tmp file in production source directory
evidence: 68KB file present at src/…/query/HybridQueryExecutor.java.tmp.16216.1771545912963
Contains full implementation of old hybrid executor with @Deprecated(since="2.0", forRemoval=true) on SAMPLE_SCAN and SPAN_COUNT enum values
Contains deprecated constructor and deprecated setCollocationPath method
Not a .java file so does not compile, but pollutes the source tree with the entire old implementation
issues.suggestion: Delete the file entirely; if it needs to be preserved for reference, move it to a docs/ or archive/ directory outside src/.

issues.summary: SimpleTagger class has no production callers after UDPipe/Stanza migration
evidence: No import of pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.tagging.SimpleTagger anywhere in src/main/java/ (excluding .tmp files)
Class is tested by SimpleTaggerTest but never called from Main.java or any API/query path
Was the pre-BlackLab fallback tagger; UDPipe/Stanza now handles all tagging externally
issues.suggestion: Remove SimpleTagger.java and its test unless there is a documented plan to reintroduce in-process tagging; if removal is deferred, add a comment naming the tracked issue.

issues.summary: QueryExecutor interface retains stale 'legacy/hybrid' references and a vestigial backward-compat default method
evidence: Line 9: Javadoc reads 'Allows different implementations (legacy, hybrid, BlackLab) to be used interchangeably' — legacy and hybrid implementations no longer exist

Line 46: executeBcqlQuery() default body comment says '// Default: treat BCQL as CQL (for backward compatibility)' — only BlackLabQueryExecutor exists and it overrides this method, making the shim dead
Line 82: getExecutorType() Javadoc example values include '"legacy"' and '"hybrid"'
issues.suggestion: Update the class-level Javadoc to reflect only BlackLab; remove or update stale return-value examples in getExecutorType(); if executeBcqlQuery's default is truly never needed, consider making it abstract.

issues.summary: LongIntHashMap utility class has no production callers after hybrid indexer removal
evidence: No import or use of LongIntHashMap in any file under src/main/java/ (only in LongIntHashMapTest)
Utility was part of the precomputed collocations path in the old hybrid indexer which was removed
issues.suggestion: Remove LongIntHashMap.java and its test unless planned for future use; if kept, add a comment stating its intended consumer.

issues.summary: HybridAlgorithmTest.java tests GrammarConfigLoader but retains the old hybrid executor name
evidence: Class named HybridAlgorithmTest; body imports only GrammarConfigLoader and has no reference to any hybrid executor
All tests in the class verify grammar config loading and relation patterns
The name is a leftover from when this test file exercised HybridQueryExecutor algorithms
issues.suggestion: Rename to GrammarRelationsTest or GrammarConfigTest to accurately reflect the tested subject.

root_causes: Migration cleanup pass was not completed after the BlackLab adoption: temp files, dead classes, and stale comments were not removed before the code was declared done.
The HybridQueryExecutor was externalized to a .tmp file rather than deleted, suggesting an incomplete or interrupted cleanup step.
